assertions.assertion: Program.cs sets options.KeyManagement.Enabled = true (or does not set it to false, since true is the default)
assertions.rationale: Does not set KeyManagement.Enabled to false, so it defaults to true.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddSigningCredential with the result of GetSigningKeyFromVault() and an algorithm (e.g. RS256)
assertions.rationale: Calls AddSigningCredential with key from GetSigningKeyFromVault() and RS256.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs does NOT call AddValidationKey for the static key (that is Phase 2, not Phase 1)
The code includes a comment or is structured to indicate this is Phase 1 of migration from static to automatic key management
assertions.rationale: No explicit Phase 1 comments or structured migration indication.
